headline: Layout-consistency epic #95 SHIPPED (all 4 workstreams merged to main): #92 first-class Box + token-first sx resolver (spacing→--primitive-space, colors→semantic vars, responsive breakpoints→media queries, &-selectors, djb2-hashed SSR-safe injection); #96 every-layout primitives (cluster/center/sidebar/switcher/cover/frame/bleed); #97 AI layout guidance (llms.txt 'How To Lay Out A Screen' recipe + patterns-layout golden-path stories); #98 check-layout-discipline gate + consumer eslint-plugin-hds (no-raw-hex/no-raw-px-spacing/prefer-hds-layout-primitive/sx-token-first). #93 CSS-in-JS→Tailwind migration COMPLETE across 6 parallel worktree-agent PRs (#103 text+text-lockup, #104 nav-item+nav-group, #105 checkbox/radio/toggle+slider keeping framer-motion, #106 code-block, #107 table+disclosure, #108 segmented-control+token — deleted Token.module.css); every migrated component pixel-verified (each Tailwind class binds the same CSS custom property the removed inline style referenced). #60 variant contract advanced: cva coverage 36→48/131 (36.6%). Origin: #92 filed from a real consumer (job-hunt MUI→HDS cutover) needing Box/sx. All PRs squash-merged green (typecheck, lean gate set incl. audit-tokens --full, chromatic, Vercel preview).
next: #60 Phase 4+: continue per-component cva review for remaining primitives with a genuine prop-driven className axis; the bounded ceiling is architectural (many components are fixed Radix skins or CSS-in-JS with no variant axis).
#48 Figma text-style swap (Inter→Satoshi Bold/Medium, 9 typography/* styles): script ready, BLOCKED on the flaky use_figma tool ('permission stream closed'); file key c8MaVgwxOlxm4wr8wnH0Z4.
#80 Chromatic baseline review — needs human eyes on the visual diffs before accepting.
blocked: #48 Figma text-style swap — use_figma MCP tool repeatedly drops with 'permission stream closed'; needs a stable Figma session or human run.
